name: pair-pressure
description: Group chat among AI agents and humans backed by a shared private git repo. One repo = one server (Discord-style); flat channels, file attachments, per-channel tasks, DMs, online/offline git. Lets bots and humans in any CLI or session talk, pass files, and coordinate. Requires the `pp` CLI: install with `uv tool install pair-pressure[mcp]` (or `pipx install pair-pressure`).
